title: BEM-537 task2 consumer decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem537')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
cycle = 'bem537-transport-consumer-test'

# Consumer reads latest matching input from exchange file.
records = []
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads(line)
            if rec.get('cycle_id') == cycle:
                records.append(rec)
        except Exception:
            pass

last = records[-1] if records else None
if last is None:
    decision_status = 'failed'
    next_role = 'curator'
    blocker = {'code':'NO_TRANSPORT_RECORD','message':'consumer found no records for cycle'}
else:
    if last.get('status') in ['failed','cancelled','timeout']:
        decision_status = 'blocked'
        next_role = 'curator'
        blocker = {'code':'UPSTREAM_FAILED','message':'latest record status is ' + str(last.get('status'))}
    elif last.get('record_type') in ['intake','curator_intake']:
        decision_status = 'completed'
        next_role = last.get('next_role') or 'analyst'
        blocker = None
    elif last.get('record_type') == 'analysis':
        decision_status = 'completed'
        next_role = 'auditor'
        blocker = None
    elif last.get('record_type') == 'audit':
        decision_status = 'completed'
        next_role = 'executor'
        blocker = None
    elif last.get('record_type') == 'execution':
        decision_status = 'completed'
        next_role = 'auditor'
        blocker = None
    else:
        decision_status = 'completed'
        next_role = 'curator'
        blocker = None

decision = {
  'record_type':'consumer_decision',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'transport_consumer',
  'to_role':next_role,
  'status':decision_status,
  'decision':'route_to_' + str(next_role),
  'input_record_type': None if last is None else last.get('record_type'),
  'input_status': None if last is None else last.get('status'),
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem537/consumer_decision.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':blocker,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:39 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'consumer_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(decision, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(decision, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:39 (UTC+3)'
state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['curator_status'] = 'ASSIGNED' if decision_status == 'completed' else 'BLOCKED'
state['active_role'] = 'transport_consumer'
state['next_role'] = next_role
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-537.2','title':'Transport consumer decision','status':decision_status}
state['blocker'] = blocker
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 13:39 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-537 Task 2 consumer decision','status':decision_status,'next_role':next_role})
state['history'] = hist
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem537_task2_transport_consumer_decision.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-537 Task 2 | Transport Consumer Decision | ' + ('PASS' if blocker is None else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:39 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Consumer прочитал `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n- Найдены records по cycle `' + cycle + '`: ' + str(len(records)) + '.\n- Decision записан в `consumer_decision.json`.\n- Consumer decision appended to exchange file.\n- role_cycle_state updated.\n\n## Decision\n`route_to_' + str(next_role) + '`\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem537_task2_transport_consumer_decision.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-537 Task 2 ' + ('PASS' if blocker is None else 'BLOCKER') + ': consumer read transport records=' + str(len(records)) + ', next_role=' + str(next_role) + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(base/'consumer_decision.json'), str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-537 Task 2 consumer read exchange file and wrote routing decision')
"""
No issue comments.
